rows.finalText: On "What is the next right step in my calling", this 3-card leans into purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. Book (26) in Past sets the tone with not everything is visible yet. The middle turn shapes how the outcome develops. Read it as movement, not a frozen verdict. This spread works best when read as motion rather than summary. At the pivot, Present places Stars (16) at the center, where emerging clear guidance and long-range direction matters most. The sequence is cumulative, so the center changes how the ending lands. The likely direction shows in Future through Scythe (10), and it suggests urgent prioritization is required once the pivot is met directly. Book (26) with Stars (16) gives the clearest subtext: a blend of knowledge and guidance, asking you to research deeply and disclose responsibly while staying alert to idealizing without execution.
